$schema: 12 GBP posts (Mon/Wed/Fri x 4 weeks). Posts API is deprecated — these are paste-ready for the GBP web UI. Each post has title, body, CTA button text + URL, recommended photo asset.

posts.title: Zero-Cost Parking Enforcement for Phoenix Properties
posts.body:
Did you know parking enforcement can cost your property absolutely nothing?

Axle Towing & Impound provides 24/7 private property towing and parking enforcement at zero cost to property owners across the Phoenix metro area.

We handle everything: compliant signage, scheduled patrols, unauthorized vehicle removal, and monthly enforcement reports for your board or management team.

Call 480-288-5526 for a free property assessment.

posts.title: Arizona Towing Signage Requirements — Is Your Property Compliant?
posts.body:
Under ARS 9-499.05, every private property in Arizona must have specific towing signage at EVERY entrance to legally enforce parking.

Signs must include: the towing company's name, phone number, address, and hours of enforcement.

Non-compliant signage can invalidate tows and expose property owners to liability.

Not sure if your signs are compliant? We offer free signage audits — no obligation.
posts.photo_hint: Compliant towing sign at property entrance

posts.title: Free 30-Day Parking Enforcement Trial
posts.body:
Apartment managers and HOA boards: try professional parking enforcement for 30 days — completely free.

We'll install compliant signage, patrol your property, and handle all unauthorized vehicle removal. Zero risk, zero commitment.

If you love the results (and every property does), we continue. If not, no hard feelings.

posts.title: HOA Towing: Customized for Every Community
posts.body:
Every HOA has different parking rules — guest passes, permit systems, reserved spaces, overnight restrictions.

Axle Towing builds a customized enforcement program around YOUR community's CC&Rs.

Monthly reports for board meetings.
24/7 emergency dispatch.
Compliant signage at no charge.
Zero cost to the HOA.

posts.title: What Property Managers Need to Know About Private Property Towing
posts.body:
Arizona law (ARS 9-499.05) gives property owners the right to remove unauthorized vehicles from private property — but only if the proper signage is in place.

Three things every property manager should know:

1. Signage must be posted at EVERY entrance
2. You must use a licensed, bonded tow company
3. The vehicle owner must be notified by the towing company per MVD requirements

We handle all of this for you. Free assessment at axletowing.com/get-quote.
posts.photo_hint: Property manager reviewing compliance checklist (team photo)

posts.title: Serving the Phoenix Metro 24/7/365
posts.body:
From Apache Junction to Glendale, Scottsdale to Laveen — Axle Towing & Impound serves the entire Valley.

24/7 dispatch. 30-minute average response. Zero cost to property owners.

Whether you manage 20 units or 2,000, we customize our enforcement program to your property's exact needs.
posts.photo_hint: Map of Phoenix metro with Axle Towing brand overlay

posts.title: Commercial Property Towing: Keep Your Parking Lots Customer-Ready
posts.body:
Non-customer vehicles in your parking lot cost you business.

Axle Towing & Impound provides fast, professional parking enforcement for retail centers, office parks, and commercial properties across Phoenix.

We remove unauthorized vehicles quickly — protecting your customers' access and your tenants' satisfaction.
posts.photo_hint: Commercial parking lot with truck removing vehicle

posts.title: The 3 Most Common Parking Violations We Tow From Phoenix Properties
posts.body:
After thousands of tows across the Valley, here are the violations that cause the most issues:

1. Abandoned vehicles — old tags, no movement for weeks
2. Fire lane parking — a safety and liability emergency
3. Reserved spot violations — residents and tenants lose their assigned spaces

All three are immediately towable with proper signage in place.

Got a problem that won't go away? Call 480-288-5526 and we'll assess your property.
posts.photo_hint: Truck towing vehicle from fire lane

posts.title: Free Property Parking Assessment — Apache Junction + Phoenix
posts.body:
Not sure if your property has a parking problem? We'll come assess it for free.

Our team will:
Review your current signage compliance.
Walk your parking lot and identify violation hot spots.
Recommend a customized enforcement schedule.
Provide a written report — no charge.

Zero commitment. We just want you to see the difference professional enforcement makes.
posts.photo_hint: Team member reviewing signage at property

posts.title: 24/7 Dispatch — We Never Close
posts.body:
Unauthorized vehicle at 2am? Fire lane blocked at midnight?

Axle Towing & Impound dispatches 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year — including holidays.

Our two-location coverage means faster response times across the entire Valley. Average on-site: 30 minutes or less.
posts.photo_hint: Truck at night / lit-up dispatch center

posts.title: Monthly Enforcement Reports: Why Your HOA Board Needs Them
posts.body:
Property boards are asking: 'Are we actually enforcing parking rules?'

Axle Towing provides monthly enforcement reports showing:
- Number of tows by violation type
- Patrol frequency and coverage
- Signage compliance status
- Recommendations for rule adjustments

This documentation protects the HOA from resident complaints and gives boards the data they need for informed decisions.

posts.title: Phoenix's Private Property Towing Specialists
posts.body:
30+ years of combined towing experience. 24/7/365 dispatch. Two strategic locations.

Axle Towing & Impound isn't a general roadside service — we specialize exclusively in private property enforcement and HOA towing.

That focus means faster response, better compliance documentation, and a team that knows Arizona towing law inside and out.
